# NBA Stats API
API version: version

## Auth
No authentication required.

## Base URL
https://stats.nba.com/stats

## Setup
1. No auth setup needed
2. GET /playerdashptshots -- verify access

## Endpoints

91 endpoints across 91 groups. See references/api-spec.lap for full details.
